meta.title: Deployment Pipelines and CI/CD
meta.excerpt: Setting up automated deployment pipelines, testing, and continuous integration for production deployments.

seo.metaDescription: Build reliable CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments.

blocks.content: Automated deployment pipelines ensure consistent, reliable releases with built-in testing and security checks.

blocks.title: Release Safety
blocks.content: Require green checks on all critical jobs before promoting to production.
